news.t: Amplify ETFs Declares June Income Distributions for its ETFs
Amplify ETFs Completes Acquisition to Reach $9.1 Billion AUM Across 31 ETFs

holdings.infoBox: ETHO is an equity ETF with a total of 290 individual holdings. The top holdings are MaxLinear stock at 1.47%, Aehr Test Systems at 0.89%, CEVA, Inc. at 0.74%, Veeco Instruments at 0.69%, and Semtech at 0.66%.

overview.description: The Amplify Etho Climate Leadership U.S. ETF (ETHO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Etho Climate Leadership index. The fund tracks the performance of an equal-weighted index that selects US stocks that exhibit the least carbon impact within its industry. The fund excludes certain industries with negative ESG profiles. ETHO was launched on Nov 18, 2015 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
